description: Amplitude is a product analytics platform for collecting event data, analyzing user behavior, managing experiments and feature flags, and governing product data. It also offers AI-assisted workflows such as MCP-based access to Amplitude content and analytics.
summary: Amplitude exposes authenticated HTTP APIs for analytics ingestion and management, an OAuth-protected MCP server at `https://mcp.amplitude.com/mcp`, and the `@amplitude/wizard` CLI.
